categories.label: Guild Building VP
categories.description: Points earned from constructed guild buildings

categories.label: Public Building VP
categories.description: Points earned from constructed public buildings

categories.label: Mine Row Dominance
categories.description: Bonus points for having the most mine tiles in each row on the Prospecting board

categories.label: Dot Matching VP
categories.description: Points from matching colored dots on adjacent buildings in the city

categories.label: Patrician Scoring VP
categories.description: Points earned across the three patrician scoring rounds (end of last 3 rounds)

categories.label: Reputation Bonus/Penalty
categories.description: Points gained or lost from reputation standing at end of game

categories.label: Remaining Groschen VP
categories.description: Points from leftover groschen at end of game
